meta.description: Abstract human template (22 layers, 5 animations). Canvas: 128×192px (64×96 body in 50×50 grid, ×2 upscale). All concrete human specs extend this.

frame.layer-offsets: pelvis:0,-1; torso:0,-1; neck:0,-1; head:0,-1; face:0,-1; hair_back:0,-1; hair_front:0,-1; upper_arm_right:0,-1; upper_arm_left:0,-1; accessory:0,-1
